import { createPlugin } from "seroval"; const ShallowErrorPlugin = /* @__PURE__ */ createPlugin({ tag: "$TSR/Error", test(value) { return value instanceof Error; }, parse: { sync(value, ctx) { return { message: ctx.parse(value.message) }; }, async async(value, ctx) { return { message: await ctx.parse(value.message) }; }, stream(value, ctx) { return { message: ctx.parse(value.message) }; } }, serialize(node, ctx) { return "new Error(" + ctx.serialize(node.message) + ")"; }, deserialize(node, ctx) { return new Error(ctx.deserialize(node.message)); } }); export { ShallowErrorPlugin }; //# sourceMappingURL=ShallowErrorPlugin.js.map
